ogTitle: Tarcoola Beach vs Tardun: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Tarcoola Beach and Tardun.
heading: Tarcoola Beach vs Tardun — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tarcoola Beach, Western Australia and Tardun, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tarcoola Beach has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Tardun (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tarcoola Beach or Tardun safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tarcoola Beach has a flood risk score of 46/100, while Tardun scores 55/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tarcoola Beach scores 28/100 for bushfire risk. Tardun scores 59/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tarcoola Beach or Tardun?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tarcoola Beach has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.13% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
